Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers

Class NpbkFileChooserFX

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers.NpbkFileChooserFX
public final class NpbkFileChooserFX extends Object
Unified Java FX file-chooser helper.
  • chooseExisting(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, javafx.stage.Stage) replicates the original npbkFileChooser behaviour: pick an existing file or throw NoFileException on cancel.
  • chooseAndCreate(javafx.stage.Stage, java.lang.String, java.lang.String) adds extension enforcement, remembers the last directory, and (optionally) creates the file if it does not exist.
This class is final and cannot be instantiated.

  • Method Details

    • chooseExisting

      public static File chooseExisting(String title, String description, String filePattern, javafx.stage.Stage owner) throws NoFileException
      Displays a JavaFX FileChooser configured to select an existing file. The dialog uses the provided title, description, and file pattern for its filter. It sets the initial directory based on PreferencesManager.getLastDirectory(). If a file is selected, its parent directory is saved back to preferences.
      Parameters:
      title - The title for the file chooser dialog window.
      description - The description for the file extension filter (e.g., "Company file").
      filePattern - The file extension pattern (e.g., "*.npbk").
      owner - The owner Stage for the dialog. This helps with proper modality.
      Returns:
      The selected File.
      Throws:
      NoFileException - if the user cancels the dialog or no file is selected.

    • chooseAndCreate

      public static File chooseAndCreate(javafx.stage.Stage owner, String title, String extension) throws ActionCancelledException, NoFileCreatedException
      Displays a JavaFX FileChooser that allows the user to select an existing file or specify a new filename. It can enforce a specific file extension and optionally prompt to create the file if it doesn't exist.

      The dialog's initial directory is set from PreferencesManager.getLastDirectory(). If a file is chosen (either existing or a new name):

      • The parent directory is saved to preferences.
      • If an extension is provided and the selected filename doesn't have it, the extension is appended.
      • If the (potentially extension-modified) file does not exist, the user is prompted with a confirmation dialog to create it. If declined, NoFileCreatedException is thrown. If creation fails due to an IOException, NoFileCreatedException is also thrown, wrapping the original IO error.

      Parameters:
      owner - The owner Stage for the dialogs.
      title - The title for the file chooser dialog window.
      extension - The desired file extension (e.g., ".npbk" or "npbk"). If null, no specific extension is enforced or added, though a generic filter might still be applied.
      Returns:
      The selected or created File.
      Throws:
      ActionCancelledException - if the user cancels the initial file chooser dialog.
      NoFileCreatedException - if the user declines to create a new file when prompted, or if file creation fails.
